introSection: Tornado  was a wooden roller coaster built by US manufacturer Philadelphia Toboggan Company previously located at Petticoat Junction in Panama City, Florida, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Tornado was built using parts from the Tornado at Wedgewood Village. However, their layouts were completely different, thus making it a new coaster instead of a relocation.

fullText:
Tornado  was a wooden roller coaster built by US manufacturer Philadelphia Toboggan Company previously located at Petticoat Junction in Panama City, Florida, USA.

The Tornado was built using parts from the Tornado at Wedgewood Village. However, their layouts were completely different, thus making it a new coaster instead of a relocation.
